description_long: This factory building features a modern industrial design with a rectangular footprint and a flat roof. The structure is composed of two main elongated blocks, separated by a central corridor and flanked by geometric-patterned roofing over a large open area, possibly for assembly or storage. The exterior is predominantly black and white, with large horizontal bands and minimal ornamentation, emphasizing functionality. There are several staircases and platforms, as well as two prominent streetlights at the perimeter, suggesting outdoor operational areas. The building includes a few small windows and what appears to be a loading dock area, but lacks visible smokestacks. Rooftop equipment is present, indicating HVAC or other industrial machinery.
description: A modern industrial factory building with two main blocks, geometric-patterned roofing, and rooftop machinery, finished in black and white.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, geometric-patterned roof, staircases, and two streetlights at the perimeter.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the geometric-patterned roof, a large platform, and the side of the two main building blocks.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the two main blocks, a central staircase, and minimal window openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing rooftop machinery, the geometric roof, and the side of the loading dock area.
